rows.label: qev040701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh no-mo, oh no-mo. I'm in a
desperate situation-mo. What
on earth should I do-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0002
rows.name: Ahh, I want someone to help me-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0010
rows.name: Listen

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask to hear in detail about what happened.

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0020
rows.name: Soothe

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0021
rows.name: Have her take a deep breath to calm down.

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's a tale of tears to
hear, and tears to tell-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0004
rows.name:
I finally opened a traditional crafts
shop, but no customers are coming-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0005
rows.name: So I'm about to go out of business-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0006
rows.name:
*Inhale* *exhale* *inhale* *exhale*
*inhale* *exhale* *inhale* *exhale*
I've calmed down a little bit-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0007
rows.name:
Now that I've calmed down,
I want to consult you-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0008
rows.name:
Actually, I finally opened a
traditional crafts shop, but
no customers are coming-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0009
rows.name: So I'm about to go out of business-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0010
rows.name:
At this rate, I'll have to close up shop
very soon-mo. What should I do-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0090
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0091
rows.name: Tell her that customers won't come with such a poor location.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0100
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask why she decided to open a traditional crafts shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0013
rows.name: That might certainly be true-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0014
rows.name:
But I really wanted to open my
shop in the Dodonga Caravan-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0015
rows.name:
This is the place where my grandma's
grandpa's cousin's friend's grandpa
opened a shop a long time ago-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0016
rows.name:
So for Nossu, this place is
a place of admiration-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's because my grandma's
grandpa's cousin's friend's
grandpa opened a shop here-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0018
rows.name:
I heard stories that his shop was
extremely prosperous and everyone was
smiling... so I've always admired it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0019
rows.name:
My grandma's grandpa's
cousin's friend's grandpa[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0020
rows.name:
passed down these crafts for generations,
and Nossu's dream is to spread them
throughout the universe-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0021
rows.name:
I believed that the various aliens on this planet would
definitely come to love Nopon traditional crafts too...
and that's why I've worked so hard up to this point-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0022
rows.name:
But it's no good-mo. My
dreams are shattered-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0023
rows.name:
At this rate, I have no choice
but to close up shop-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0024
rows.name:
The crafting techniques passed down
to me will also disappear-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0025
rows.name:
If only I had some sort of
flagship product that could
serve as an advertisement...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0068
rows.name:
Come to think of it, I've seen
you somewhere before-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0030
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you are Tatsu's companion.

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0040
rows.name: Play Dumb

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you've never seen her before.

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0027
rows.name:
That's right-mo! You were Tatsu's
Earthling acquaintance-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0028
rows.name:
Hmmm, hmmm. Nossu feels like
she's seen you somewhere...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0029
rows.name:
I got it! You're Tatsu's
Earthling companion-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Earthlings, huh... I had a
flash of inspiration-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0031
rows.name:
Nopon crafts don't appeal to
Earthlings very much-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0032
rows.name:
But if it's a Nopon Hat, Earthlings
can wear it too, and it seems
like it'll be popular-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0033
rows.name:
As long as I have the materials,
I can definitely make a hat that
will appeal to Earthlings-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0034
rows.name:
I want you to lend Nossu
your strength here-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0050
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask in detail what kind of traditional craft she wants to make.

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask what kind of materials you should look for.

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0035
rows.name:
A hat-mo! If I have Noctilucent
Dragonflies, Harnenga Cotton, and Lava
Mangoes, I can make a wonderful hat-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0037
rows.name:
You'll look for them for me-mo! Noctilucent
Dragonflies, Harnenga Cotton, and Lava Mangoes-mo.
If I have these, I can make a wonderful hat-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0038
rows.name: Please, I'm begging you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0039
rows.name:
Thank you for accepting-mo! I'll
be looking forward to it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0040
rows.name:
What Nossu wants are Noctilucent
Dragonflies, Harnenga Cotton,
and Lava Mangoes-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0041
rows.name:
Please bring them quickly-mo. Otherwise,
my shop will go out of business-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0073
rows.name:
As I thought, it's not selling at all-mo...
If I don't make a top-selling product soon,
Nossu and her shop are ruined-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0074
rows.name:
Ah... How is it-mo? Did you get the
materials for the Nopon Hat-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0042
rows.name:
Now we have them all-mo... Well
then... Next, I need either Vibrant
Plumes or Fluffy Tufts-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0070
rows.name: Shock

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0071
rows.name: Express shock that she still needs more materials.

rows.label: qev040701_JNK0080
rows.name: Reluctant

rows.label: qev040701_SEL0081
rows.name: Say that since you've come this far, you'll continue to cooperate.

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0043
rows.name:
I'm sorry-mo. What you brought me
are just the raw materials-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0044
rows.name:
Without Vibrant Plumes or Fluffy Tufts,
I can't synthesize it properly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0045
rows.name:
Please-mo, I really want you
to bring them-mo. The fate of
my shop rests on this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0046
rows.name:
I'm terribly sorry-mo. What you brought
me are just the raw materials-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0047
rows.name:
Without Vibrant Plumes or Fluffy Tufts,
I can't synthesize it properly-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0048
rows.name:
Please-mo, I really want you
to bring them-mo. The fate of
my shop rests on this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0049
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]...Fu-mo! Then I'll explain the
hat I'm going to make now-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0050
rows.name:
If I have Vibrant Plumes, I can
make a stylish, bright red hat-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0051
rows.name:
If I have Fluffy Tufts, I can
make a tiny, cute hat-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0052
rows.name:
So it can become a hat that Earthlings
will like, I want you to bring either
one, whichever is fine-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0053
rows.name: I'm leaving it in your hands-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0054
rows.name:
What I need is either Vibrant
Plumes or Fluffy Tufts-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0075
rows.name:
Oh, you're back-mo! Thank
you for your hard work-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0055
rows.name:
Vibrant Plumes or Fluffy Tufts... Did
you bring what Nossu asked for-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0056
rows.name:
Thank you-mo! With this, I can
make a stylish red hat-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0057
rows.name:
I'm going to keep increasing my
inventory at this rate-mo! And
then get my shop on track-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0058
rows.name:
My grandma's grandpa's cousin's
friend's grandpa will surely be
happy for me in heaven-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0059
rows.name:
Earthlings sometimes wear hats
with a shape similar to this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0060
rows.name:
Nossu knows-mo... I believe
they're called Santa hats-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0061
rows.name:
I will widely market them as
Nopon-made Santa hats!! -mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0062
rows.name:
Thank you-mo! With this, I can
make a tiny and cute hat-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0063
rows.name:
I'm going to keep increasing my
inventory at this rate-mo! And
then get my shop on track-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0064
rows.name:
My grandma's grandpa's cousin's
friend's grandpa will surely be
happy for me in heaven-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0065
rows.name:
Earthlings sometimes wear hats
with a shape similar to this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0066
rows.name:
Nossu knows-mo... I believe they're
called pom-pom beanies-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040701_MSG0067
rows.name:
I will widely market them as
Nopon-made pom-pom beanies!! -mo![ST:wait ]
